creator: nalitoja@gmail.com
text:
I can't reproduce it on X11 build, e.g. with GTK2 toolkit.
So, it should be tested in `-nw' mode, e.g `emacs -Q -nw'.

Also, BROKEN_SIGIO probably doesn't affect us unlike, say, OpenBSD.
It's not defined for GNU/kFreeBSD and Darwin and seems to work fine with
X11 based on my limited testing.
